fields.// override-sortable-facetable: key field: Azure forbids sortable/facetable on the key
fields.name: id

fields.// searchable=true: text-content field (playbook display name) used for full-text query; sortable/facetable=true per policy
fields.name: playbookName

fields.// searchable=true: long-form description text used for full-text query; sortable/facetable=false: long-text fields cannot be sort/facet keys
fields.name: description

fields.// override-sortable: Collection(Edm.String): Azure forbids sortable on collections; searchable=true: trigger phrases are full-text dispatch keys
fields.name: triggerPhrases

fields.// override-sortable: Collection(Edm.String): Azure forbids sortable on collections; searchable=true: tags are short text content acceptable for full-text query
fields.name: tags

fields.// override-sortable: Collection(Edm.String): Azure forbids sortable on collections; searchable=true: documentTypes are short categorical text
fields.name: documentTypes

fields.// vector-field: 3072-dim HNSW cosine; retrievable=false (vector payload is heavy, excluded from $select); stored=true retains for reranking; searchable=true enables vector search
fields.name: contentVector3072
